_comment: Studio hooks — subset adapted from ECC. Activate by merging into ~/.claude/settings.json hooks section.
_docs: Each hook runs a Python script from ~/.studio/scripts/hooks/. Scripts are Python for stack consistency.

hooks.description: Save session state before context compaction — prevents losing context on long sessions
Detect active project, load prior session state if available
Persist session state after each response — tracks files edited, decisions made
Track token usage and estimated cost per session — written to .studio/changelog/
macOS notification when Claude finishes a response — useful for long tasks
Run linting and type checking after file edits — language auto-detected from file extension
Before first edit on a file — verify the file has been read. Prevents blind edits.
